subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved Maid Servant of God! A detailed tablet is written to you. Praise be to God that in San Francisco you are confirmed in the service
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه مفصل بتو مرقوم گردید الحمد لله در میان فرانسیسکو بخدمت
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @birth control; preventing procreation, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
